M0760_CU_SHOPPING (M0760) Current Shopping Current ability to shop. 00 = (a) Able to plan for shopping needs and independently perform shopping tasks, including carrying packages; OR (b) Physically, cognitively, and mentally able to take care of shopping, but has not done shopping in the past (i.e., prior to this home care admission).
